items.title: [жӯЈйқў] I didnвҖҷt expect to come across such a GOOD game  i...
items.summary:
I didnвҖҷt expect to come across such a GOOD game  itвҖҷs a mix of a card game and aвҖқbattlegroundsвҖқ, strategy. I found out about it using bot $wg command, and I got the character Jenkin, a rat girl. As I love rats, I decided to download it. Let me put it this way:the storyline is FANTASTIC, the atmosphere, the characters, the art style everything is absolutely WONDERFUL this game really has its own unique vibe, and the English translation is good too I donвҖҷt know about the Polish version(since impolish) , as I play in English. I recommend it to anyone who wants to try out a new interesting story, n get new characters and cards and discover new aspects of the plot.
10/10
